reasoning: A 74% shortfall in January for a SaaS merchant most likely reflects a new or recently onboarded merchant still ramping up transaction volume toward their USD 50,000 MMC, which typically takes 3-6 months in this industry. However, the absolute shortfall of USD 37,000 is material and warrants confirmation from the sales team that a ramp-up schedule is formally documented in the contract. An ASC 606 review is recommended to ensure any prepayments or minimum commitment true-up obligations are correctly deferred or recognized in the appropriate period.
